title: Ebran (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ebran''' may refer to one of the following:

*The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''[[Ebra]]''', also known as Ebran
*The [[Foodstuff/Legends|beverage]] '''[[Ebran Lu-ramin Oilmead]]''', the primary component of which was the [[lu-ramin]] [[Oil/Legends|oil]] from planet Ebra

{{Disambig}}
